parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const dns = d.dns_data;
const web = d.website;
const ai = d.ai_profile;
const tech = d.tech_assessment;

const report = [
  '=== COMPANY RESEARCH REPORT ===',
  '',
  'Domain: ' + d.input_domain,
  d.input_company ? 'Company: ' + d.input_company : '',
  '',
  '--- AI PROFILE ---',
  '',
  ai.company_summary,
  '',
  '  Size: ' + ai.estimated_size + ' - ' + ai.estimated_employees + ' employees',
  '  Industry: ' + ai.likely_industry,
  '  Budget: ' + ai.budget_indicator,
  '  Tech maturity: ' + ai.tech_maturity,
  '',
  '  Key insight:',
  '  ' + ai.key_insight,
  '',
  '--- TECH STACK ---',
  '  ' + d.all_tech.length + ' technologies detected',
  '  Score: ' + tech.score + '/100 - ' + tech.level,
  '',
  '  Email provider: ' + dns.email_provider,
  '  Hosting: ' + dns.hosting_provider,
  '',
  '  Detected services:',
  '  ' + d.all_tech.slice(0, 8).join(', '),
  d.all_tech.length > 8 ? '  ' + d.all_tech.slice(8).join(', ') : '',
  '',
  '--- WEBSITE ---',
  '  Title: ' + (web.title || 'N/A'),
  '  ' + (web.description || 'No description').slice(0, 120),
  '',
  '--- SALES RECOMMENDATION ---',
  '  ' + ai.sales_approach,
  '',
  '=== END REPORT ===',
  'ID: ' + d.research_id,
  'Processed in ' + (Date.now() - new Date(d.started_at).getTime()) + 'ms'
].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

const clean = report.replace(/[_*\[\]()~`>#+\=|{}.!]/g, function(m) {
  if (m === '-' || m === '.') return m;
  return ' ';
}).slice(0, 4000);

return [{ json: { ...d, report: clean } }];

const d = $('11. Parse AI Profile').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  event: 'company_researched',
  research_id: d.research_id,
  domain: d.input_domain,
  tech_score: d.tech_assessment.score,
  tech_level: d.tech_assessment.level,
  services_found: d.all_tech.length,
  ai_size: d.ai_profile.estimated_size,
  ai_industry: d.ai_profile.likely_industry,
  email_provider: d.dns_data.email_provider,
  hosting: d.dns_data.hosting_provider,
  processing_ms: Date.now() - new Date(d.started_at).getTime(),
  timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
}}];
